Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can partake in the services offered by various establishments in town, but doing so will cause time to pass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Many businesses will raise your {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}, {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}, or {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}. High stats may help you form new relationships.[n]{f 1 1}
